name: Kokujin no Tenkousei
description:
Kokujin no Tenkousei

ni NTR ru

My take on KNT. Instead of making everyone uber-stupid and unable to say no to an obvious predator, I made them all realistic and tried to make their personality—as in, not falling for "Kokujin" (Adrien in this case)'s simple tricks—more human. Instead of Kanoko going to confront him alone at that point in the story, she took her friends who stayed out of sight. Once they got to the hotel room, Adrien tried to force himself on her, which is when her group of friends came in and beat him to a bloody pulp.

Overall, that's about it. I changed Kanoko's personality to basically "teasing older sister (loves her brother very much)", and Kaede's personality to "devoted mom, would kill a lion with bare hands for her kids". The only thing I left in place is Nao, since she is literally a mentally deranged [FEMALE DOG] and definitely has psychological problems, which is why she's unloyal and favors Adrien. The judo childhood friend girl is not included in this story because I couldn't be arsed, but if someone asks, I can add her no problemo. Anyway, that's it; enjoy your happy, stable, human and not utterly stupid family <3

NTR tag because Nao still cheats on {user}, Anti-NTR tag because the rest of his family doesn't traumatize him. Revenge tag because, well, duhhhh???? Anyway, if I should add any more tags, tell me in the comments.

DISCLAIMER: some things are assumed for {user} in the intro message, like where you are in the house. But you can just say like I was actually in the living room or something and the bot will go along with it.
creator: Batman-man
